title: Geepas Toastie Maker | 2 Slice Sandwich Toaster, Cooks Delicious Crispy Sandwiches | 750W, 2 Slice Sandwich Press | Cool Touch Handle, Automatic Temperature Control & Non-Stick Plate
features: 2-SLICE SANDWICH PLATES, CUT & SEAL SYSTEM – It has wide cooking plates, allowing for a more generous fill of your favourite ingredients! Their shape makes it easy to create a perfect seal, preventing the contents spilling out, to create two perfectly portioned sandwiches, Thick Grilled Cheese Toasties.

COOL TOUCH HANDLE, INDICATOR LIGHT - This sandwich maker has an insulated handle. It remains cool even during the cooking process and is safe for holding and moving. Makes triangular sandwiches and browns toasties more evenly, with all the fillings sealed inside.

AUTOMATIC TEMPERATURE CONTROL, LOCKING LID – This feature saves your sandwiches from overcooking or staying undercooked. Locking lid for toasting different sandwich thicknesses and allows convenient upright storage. Ideal for creating mouth-watering melts, paninis, ciabatta, tea cakes and crumpets. It’s also great for warming delicate treats like croissants and heating up tortillas, pittas and other flat breads.

NON-STICK COATING PLATE, EASY CLEANING, INDICATOR LIGHTS - Non-stick coating for fuss-food removal and cleaning. The sandwich maker also has non-slip feet to provide safe, easy-to-handle cooking for all the family. The toastie maker also features power and ready lights to indicate when your machine is at the optimum temperature to begin the toasting process.

COMPACT SIZE, NON-SLIP FEET, 2 YEAR WARRANTY- This sandwich toastie maker is designed to stand in an upright position; therefore, it only takes a corner to fit in and does not clutter your kitchen counter. And features cool-touch handle, non-slip feet and built-in cord storage. Comes with 2 Year Manufacturer Warranty.
description: Product Description 2 SLICE DEEP SANDWICHE PLATES To create two perfectly portioned sandwiches, Thick Grilled Cheese Toasties. HANDY INDICATOR LIGHT Indicate when the optimum toasting temperature is reached. COOL TOUCH HANDLE WITH LOCK Ensures extra safety when making tasty toasties. NON-STICK COATER PLATES Quick and easy removal of perfectly cooked toasties. SIMPLY WIPE CLEAN Easily remove food residue thanks to the non-stick coating. WIDE SLOTS Their shape makes it easy to create a perfect seal, preventing the contents spilling out, to create two perfectly portioned sandwiches. AUTOMATIC TEMPERATURE CONTROL This feature saves your sandwiches from overcooking or staying undercooked. OVERHEAT PROTECTION When your machine is at the optimum temperature to begin the toasting process.
